basic_details.job_title: TGPSC Assistant Environmental Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 19 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Telangana Public Service Commission (TGPSC), Hyderabad has released an official notification for the post of Assistant Environmental Engineer in the Telangana Pollution Control Board (TGPCB). This is a State Level direct recruitment through an Objective Type Written Examination (CBRT/OMR based) under Notification No. 02/OG/PC/2026, Dated: 02/06/2026. Online applications open on June 10, 2026 and the last date to apply is July 17, 2026 by 5:00 PM.

important_dates.admit_card_date: 7 days before exam date up to 5:00 PM on the previous day of exam

application_fee.details: Note: All unemployed candidates are exempted from the examination fee. All employees of any Government (Central / State / PSUs / Corporations / Other Government Sector) must pay the examination fee. Fee once remitted will not be refunded or adjusted under any circumstances. Payment must be made online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI.

age_limit.details: Age Limit (as on 01/07/2026): Minimum 18 years and Maximum 44 years. | Note: As per G.O.Ms.No.86, G.A.(Ser.A) Department, Dt. 18/05/2026, the upper age limit has been raised by 10 years (from 34 to 44 years). | Note: No person shall be eligible if they are at superannuation age after availing eligible age relaxations as on 01/07/2026. Employees of Corporations, Municipalities, etc., are not eligible for Government Employee age relaxation.

qualification.details: Option 1: Bachelor's Degree in Civil / Mechanical / Chemical / Bio-Technology / Mining / Environmental Engineering from a recognized University in India (established under Central/Provincial/State Act or recognized by UGC), OR qualified in Section A and B of AMIE (India) Civil Examination. Option 2: B.Tech / B.E. in any branch with a Post Graduate Degree in Environmental Engineering from a recognized University in India (established under Central/Provincial/State Act or recognized by UGC), OR qualified in Section A and B of AMIE (India) Civil Examination. Distance Education: Degrees obtained through Open Universities / Distance Education mode must be recognized by UGC / AICTE / Distance Education Bureau. The onus of proof rests with the applicant. Qualification Date: The result of the required qualification must have been declared by the University as on the date of Notification i.e., June 2, 2026.

salary_details.details: CF = Carried Forward vacancies. VH = Visually Handicapped, HH = Hearing Handicapped, OH = Orthopaedically Handicapped, MH = Multiple Handicapped.

how_to_apply: Visit the official TGPSC website at https://www.tgpsc.gov.in.
If applying for the first time, complete One Time Registration (OTR) to obtain a TGPSC ID. Note: OTR alone does not constitute an application.
Login using your TGPSC ID and Date of Birth, and enter the OTP received on your registered mobile number.
Verify details fetched from OTR - Name, Date of Birth, Educational Qualifications, Community, Gender, Disability, Ex-Servicemen status, Sports, etc.
Select your preferred examination centre from the available options.
Upload a recent passport-size colour photograph (not older than 3 months; File size: 100KB–200KB) and scanned specimen signature (File size: 20KB–30KB) in JPG/PNG format.
Preview the application carefully, then click SAVE & PAYMENT to proceed to fee payment.
Pay the prescribed fee online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI.
After payment, a PDF application will be generated. Download and retain the PDF. Note your Reference ID Number for future correspondence.
Click CONFIRM & SUBMIT to complete the submission. No changes will be made by the Commission to any submitted application.
For technical issues: Call 040-23120301 / 040-23120302 / 040-22445566 / 040-67445566 (10:30 AM to 5:00 PM on working days) or email [email protected].

content_sections.heading: TGPSC Assistant Environmental Engineer Recruitment 2026 – Overview

rows.details: Objective Type Written Exam (CBRT / OMR Based)

content_sections.heading: TGPSC Assistant Environmental Engineer Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF
content_sections.text: TGPSC has officially released the recruitment notification vide No. 02/OG/PC/2026 dated June 2, 2026 for 19 vacancies of Assistant Environmental Engineer in the Telangana Pollution Control Board. As per G.O.Ms.No.86, G.A.(Ser.A) Department, Dt. 18/05/2026 , the upper age limit has been raised by 10 years - from 34 years to 44 years . The examination is tentatively scheduled for September 2026 . Local reservation is not applicable as selection is based on state-wide merit. Candidates must register via One Time Registration (OTR) on the TGPSC website before applying. Download TGPSC Assistant Environmental Engineer Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TGPSC Assistant Environmental Engineer Recruitment 2026 Key Dates

rows.details: 7 days before exam date up to 5:00 PM on the previous day of exam

content_sections.heading: TGPSC Vacancy and Salary Highlights
content_sections.text: CF = Carried Forward vacancies. VH = Visually Handicapped, HH = Hearing Handicapped, OH = Orthopaedically Handicapped, MH = Multiple Handicapped.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria & Job Requirements
content_sections.text: Option 1: Bachelor's Degree in Civil / Mechanical / Chemical / Bio-Technology / Mining / Environmental Engineering from a recognized University in India (established under Central/Provincial/State Act or recognized by UGC), OR qualified in Section A and B of AMIE (India) Civil Examination . Option 2: B.Tech / B.E. in any branch with a Post Graduate Degree in Environmental Engineering from a recognized University in India (established under Central/Provincial/State Act or recognized by UGC), OR qualified in Section A and B of AMIE (India) Civil Examination. Distance Education: Degrees obtained through Open Universities / Distance Education mode must be recognized by UGC / AICTE / Distance Education Bureau. The onus of proof rests with the applicant. Qualification Date: The result of the required qualification must have been declared by the University as on the date of Notification i.e., June 2, 2026 .

content_sections.heading: Age Limit & Relaxations
content_sections.text: Age Limit (as on 01/07/2026): Minimum 18 years and Maximum 44 years. Note: As per G.O.Ms.No.86, G.A.(Ser.A) Department, Dt. 18/05/2026, the upper age limit has been raised by 10 years (from 34 to 44 years). Note: No person shall be eligible if they are at superannuation age after availing eligible age relaxations as on 01/07/2026. Employees of Corporations, Municipalities, etc., are not eligible for Government Employee age relaxation.

rows.category: Telangana State Government Employees (with regular service)
rows.age_relaxation: Up to 5 Years (based on length of regular service)
3 Years + Length of Armed Forces service
3 Years + Length of NCC service (minimum 6 months service required)

content_sections.heading: TGPSC Selection Methodology
content_sections.text: Written Examination (Objective Type): The exam will be held either in OMR-based Offline mode or Computer Based Recruitment Test (CBRT) mode. The Commission will notify the mode through web note / press note and Hall Ticket. Paper I – General Studies and General Abilities: 150 Questions | 150 Marks | 150 Minutes | Bilingual (English and Telugu). Paper II – Concerned Subject (Environmental Engineering): 150 Questions | 300 Marks | 150 Minutes | English Only. Total Marks: 450 Marks. Qualifying Marks: OC / Sportspersons / EWS – minimum 40%; BCs – minimum 35%; SCs / STs / PwD – minimum 30%. Normalization: For CBRT conducted in multiple sessions, scores will be normalized and results announced on percentile basis. Tie-Breaking Order: Local status (Telangana locals first) → Date of Birth (older gets priority) → Marks in subject paper → Date of passing qualifying exam → Percentage in qualifying exam → Higher qualification → Date/percentage of higher qualification. Key Publication & Objections: Provisional key published after exam; candidates can raise objections online by paying ₹500/- per question. Genuine objections reimbursed. Final key is conclusive. Memorandum of Marks: Available via online payment of ₹200/- within 30 days of result publication. No revaluation entertained.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Note: All unemployed candidates are exempted from the examination fee. All employees of any Government (Central / State / PSUs / Corporations / Other Government Sector) must pay the examination fee. Fee once remitted will not be refunded or adjusted under any circumstances. Payment must be made online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for TGPSC Assistant Environmental Engineer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official TGPSC website at https://www.tgpsc.gov.in . If applying for the first time, complete One Time Registration (OTR) to obtain a TGPSC ID. Note: OTR alone does not constitute an application. Login using your TGPSC ID and Date of Birth, and enter the OTP received on your registered mobile number. Verify details fetched from OTR - Name, Date of Birth, Educational Qualifications, Community, Gender, Disability, Ex-Servicemen status, Sports, etc. Select your preferred examination centre from the available options. Upload a recent passport-size colour photograph (not older than 3 months; File size: 100KB–200KB) and scanned specimen signature (File size: 20KB–30KB) in JPG/PNG format. Preview the application carefully, then click SAVE & PAYMENT to proceed to fee payment. Pay the prescribed fee online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. After payment, a PDF application will be generated. Download and retain the PDF. Note your Reference ID Number for future correspondence. Click CONFIRM & SUBMIT to complete the submission. No changes will be made by the Commission to any submitted application. For technical issues: Call 040-23120301 / 040-23120302 / 040-22445566 / 040-67445566 (10:30 AM to 5:00 PM on working days) or email [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies for the post of Assistant Environmental Engineer in Telangana Pollution Control Board, including carried forward vacancies from previous recruitments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the revised upper age limit for this post?
faq.answer: As per G.O.Ms.No.86, G.A.(Ser.A) Department, Dt. 18/05/2026, the upper age limit has been raised by 10 years - from 34 years to 44 years, reckoned as on 01/07/2026.

faq.question: Q3. Is a B.Tech in any branch eligible for this post?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E. in any branch are eligible only if they also hold a PG Degree in Environmental Engineering from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. Is local reservation applicable for this post?
faq.answer: No. Local reservation is not applicable as this is a State Level post and selection is made on state-wide merit.

faq.question: Q5. Are SC/ST candidates eligible for OC vacancies?
faq.answer: Yes. Applicants belonging to SC, ST, BC, EWS, and Differently Abled who avail upper age relaxation will also be considered for Open Category (OC) vacancies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the exam pattern and total marks?
faq.answer: The exam has two papers - Paper I (General Studies, 150 marks) and Paper II (Concerned Subject, 300 marks) - totaling 450 marks, with 150 questions each and 150 minutes per paper.

faq.question: Q7. Can I raise objections against the answer key?
faq.answer: Yes. After publication of the provisional key, candidates can raise objections online within the stipulated period by paying ₹500/- per question. Fee is reimbursed if the objection is found genuine.

faq.question: Q8. Will a Scribe be provided for Differently Abled candidates?
faq.answer: Yes. As per G.O.Ms.No.05, Dt: 23/03/2024, Scribe and compensatory time will be provided to eligible Differently Abled candidates. However, only TGPSC shall provide scribes - candidates cannot bring their own.
